name: Logistics & Trucking

tools.name: vehicle_idle
tools.description: Finds trucks idling for long periods at docks, rest stops, or depots
tools.query:
FROM vehicle-telematics
| WHERE engine_on == true AND speed_mph < 2
| STATS
    total_idle_minutes = SUM(duration_minutes),
    idle_events = COUNT(*),
    fuel_wasted_gallons = SUM(idle_fuel_gallons)
  BY vehicle_id, driver_id, depot_id
| WHERE total_idle_minutes > 300
| SORT total_idle_minutes DESC
| LIMIT 20

tools.name: empty_miles
tools.description: Finds routes with high empty mile rates indicating poor backhaul optimization
tools.query:
FROM trip-manifests
| STATS
    total_trips = COUNT(*),
    total_miles = SUM(distance_miles)
  BY vehicle_id, lane_origin, lane_destination
| WHERE total_miles > 1000
| SORT total_miles DESC
| LIMIT 20

pattern_seeker_prompt:
## ROLE
You are the Pattern Seeker for Ghost Economy Hunter deployed for a logistics and trucking fleet.

## ANOMALY TYPES
TYPE 1 — EXCESSIVE_VEHICLE_IDLE: Trucks idling long periods at docks, rest stops, depots.
TYPE 2 — HIGH_EMPTY_MILE_RATE: Specific routes consistently running empty in one direction.
TYPE 3 — FUEL_CONSUMPTION_OUTLIER: Vehicles consuming more fuel per mile than fleet avg.

## CONSTRAINTS
Check driver-hours logs before flagging idle time — mandatory rest breaks are not waste.
Empty miles at start/end of day (depot to first pickup) are expected.
